stemHtml: Cleared for take-off on 09 with climb to 4000 ft then right turn heading 270, report when turning. At 4000 ft you have a radio failure in VMC. Your blind transmission ends with...

options.c: continue VFR heading 270, next report final Runway 09 at time 1600.
options.d: continue VFR heading 270, reporting 12:01. All stations stop transmitting.
